terminal.pasteConfirm: The text to paste is {{bytes}} bytes. Do you want to continue?

remoteAccess.missingTokenForMobileMode: Remote token is required for mobile mode.

language.title: Language
language.description: App UI display language (System follows the OS locale)

defaultProfile.title: Default Profile
defaultProfile.description: New terminal sessions will use this profile

font.uiFontDescription: Font for the app UI chrome — view titles, buttons, lists, the workspace selector and dock.
font.uiFontFaceDesc: Choose (Default) to use the built-in font.
font.appFontDescription: Base font inherited by non-terminal content views like Memo and Issue Reporter. Terminal fonts are set in Profile Defaults.
font.inheritAppFont: Leave empty to inherit the app font

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.stabilityDesc: Use the stabilized cursor path for redraw-heavy interactive apps like Codex and Claude.
cursor.applyNote: Cursor changes apply to new terminals.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.scrollbackLinesDesc: Number of lines stored in history
advanced.bellStyleDesc: How the terminal bell is signaled
advanced.suppressTitleDesc: Prevent shell from changing the tab title
advanced.snapOnInputDesc: Auto-scroll to input line when typing
advanced.restoreCwdDesc: Restore last working directory on restart
advanced.restoreCwdEnable: Start terminal in last used directory
advanced.restoreOutputDesc: Restore previous terminal output on restart
advanced.restoreOutputEnable: Show previous session output above new shell
advanced.cwdPropagationDesc: Whether this profile's terminals send/receive working directory changes within a sync group

defaults.title: Profile Defaults
defaults.description: These settings apply to all new profiles. Individual profiles can override them.

profile.additionalIntro: Override defaults for this profile. Click "Reset" to restore inherited value.
profile.name: Name
profile.commandLineDesc: Executable to run when this profile is launched
profile.startupCommandDesc: Command to run after shell initialization
profile.tabTitleDesc: Leave empty to use profile name
profile.hiddenDesc: Hide this profile from dropdown menus

paste.title: Paste
paste.smartPasteDesc: On Ctrl+V, paste clipboard files/images as paths
paste.imageDirDesc: Image save path (leave empty to use the default directory)
paste.smartRemoveLineBreakDesc: Restore URLs broken by line breaks when pasting
paste.smartLinkJoinDesc: Detect indented multi-line URLs as a single clickable link
paste.multiFileSeparatorDesc: Separator between paths when pasting multiple files
paste.quotePathsDesc: Wrap each pasted file path in double quotes (useful for paths with spaces)
paste.largeWarningDesc: Show a confirmation dialog when pasting large text

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.copyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy to clipboard when selecting text in the terminal
terminal.scrollbarStyleDesc: How the terminal scrollbar is shown. Overlay overlaps the content, Separate takes its own space.
terminal.pathLinkDesc: Underline a selected file/folder path; click to open the file in the viewer or change the directory.
terminal.pathLinkMaxLengthDesc: Selections longer than this (characters) are not treated as a path.
terminal.scrollToBottomButtonDesc: Show the floating button that jumps to the bottom when scrolled up into the scrollback.

interface.title: Interface
interface.hoverAutoHideDesc: Delay before hiding the control bar when the mouse is idle (0 = never hide)
interface.controlBarModeDesc: Default control bar mode for new panes
interface.dockPersistDesc: Keep dock state in the background even when hidden (terminal processes keep running)
interface.dockArrowNavDesc: Allow entering/leaving the dock area with Alt+Arrow
interface.dockArrowFocusPaneDesc: Auto-move focus from the dock to a pane when switching workspaces with arrows
interface.notificationDismissDesc: When notifications are marked as read
interface.dismissManual: Dismiss only by clicking the notification

remote.title: Remote
remote.enabledDesc: Open Direct Remote Mode automatically on the next app start. A token is generated when this is enabled without one.
remote.allowedIpsDesc: IP/CIDR allowlist for browser remote clients.
remote.autoMobileMinWidthDesc: 0 disables. At or below this app window width, Remote Access opens automatically.
remote.customHostsDesc: Host names or IPs to offer in the Remote Access copy URL selector.
remote.preferredHostDesc: Host preselected in Remote Access URLs. Automatic uses the last selected host, then the first available candidate.
remote.cloudRelayBaseUrlDesc: Relay URL used for cloud pairing. Leave the product default unless you are using a development relay.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.pathEllipsisDesc: Truncation direction for long paths (workspace list)
workspaces.hiddenAutoCloseDesc: Auto-close terminals of hidden workspaces/panes to save resources (0 = never close). A new terminal is created when shown again.
workspaces.cwdWorkspaceDesc: Default for terminal panes inside workspaces
workspaces.cwdDockDesc: Default for terminal panes inside dock areas

claude.title: Claude Code
claude.syncCwdDesc: How cd is propagated to terminals running Claude Code
claude.restoreSessionDesc: Automatically restore Claude Code sessions on app restart
claude.sessionMaxAgeDesc: Ignore session files older than this (0 = unlimited)
claude.statusMessageModeDesc: Status source shown in the workspace list
claude.delimiterDesc: Separator text between the two sources
claude.autoResumeDesc: Automatically send a resume message once the session limit reset time has passed
claude.resumeDelayDesc: Wait this long after the limit reset time before sending
claude.resumeMessageDesc: Message to send to Claude Code after the limit resets

codex.title: Codex
codex.statusMessageModeDesc: How Codex status text is shown in the workspace list
codex.delimiterDesc: Separator string between the two texts

fileExplorer.title: File Explorer
fileExplorer.shellProfileDesc: Shell profile used for CWD sync. Uses the default profile if empty.
fileExplorer.fontFamilyDesc: Font for the file list area. Inherits the default font if empty.
fileExplorer.fontSizeDesc: Font size for the file list area (px). Default: 13
fileExplorer.paddingDesc: Inner padding of the file list area (px)
fileExplorer.copyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy the path to the clipboard when selecting a file.
fileExplorer.extensionViewersDesc: Open files with a shell program and terminal profile per extension
fileExplorer.viewerProfileMissing: Selected terminal profile does not exist.

issueReporter.title: Issue Reporter
issueReporter.shellDesc: Shell prefix to run the gh CLI. Runs gh directly if empty. Quotes supported.
issueReporter.repositoriesDesc: Repos to file issues to (owner/repo). The first item is selected by default.
issueReporter.paddingDesc: Inner padding of the issue reporter area (px)

memo.title: Memo
memo.paddingDesc: Inner padding of the memo area (px)
memo.indentSizeDesc: Number of spaces inserted by the Tab key
memo.paragraphDetectionDesc: Separate paragraphs by N or more blank lines (used for triple-click paragraph select)
memo.tripleClickSelectDesc: Select the whole paragraph on triple-click
memo.copyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy to clipboard when drag-selecting text

recovery.parseErrorTitle: Could not read the settings file
recovery.parseErrorDescription: The JSON syntax in settings.json is invalid, so starting with default settings.

layout.overwriteTitle: Save current workspace pane layout to this template
layout.duplicateTitle: Create a copy of this layout
layout.setDefaultTitle: Use this layout when creating new workspaces
